entry.title: Resume
entry.summary:
Conner Lavineway

Email: conner@lavineway.com
Phone: (204) 390-6536

Work Experience:

Instructor Guard
City of Winnipeg
August 2025 to Present
Responsibilities:
- Engage with and teach students of all ages
- Ensure lessons are fun and informative
- Watch and critique students swimming
- Ensure the safety of my Students, Patrons, Coworkers and Myself …
entry.content:
Conner Lavineway

Email: conner@lavineway.com
Phone: (204) 390-6536

Work Experience:

Instructor Guard
City of Winnipeg
August 2025 to Present
Responsibilities:
- Engage with and teach students of all ages
- Ensure lessons are fun and informative
- Watch and critique students swimming
- Ensure the safety of my Students, Patrons, Coworkers and Myself
- Ensure my First Aid and CPR, Lifeguard, and Instructor certifications are up to date
- Keep physically fit and able to perform rescue duties
- During emergency situations I am required to stay calm, direct or lead others, and control the public as needed

Line Cook
State & Main Kitchen Bar
April 2023 to October 2025
- Responsibilities:
- Prepare food quickly and too given specifications
- Handle modifications too dishes
- Keep all stations stocked and as clean as possible
- Clean and stock all stations at the end of the night
- Lift heavy items weighing up to ~25lbs

Camp Counsellor
Code Cobras
July 2022 to August 2022
Campers age vary from 6-14
- Open and close camp
- Direct campers to and from activities
- Running activities for campers
- Spend 3 hours teaching campers coding
- Ensuring campers safety and well-being at all times
- Work with parents for signing in and signing out children
- Verify when children will be missing due to family reasons or otherwise

Lead Close
Nuburger
February 2021 to June 2023
- Open and close store
- Trusted with a key and code to store
- Make sure food is made quickly and is of high quality
- Make sure close is up to standard
- Help in training of new employees
- Work with customers and providing the best service for them
- Handle Money
- Run trays of food
- Make sure everything ordered is accounted for

Education:

Pursuing: Bachelor's Degree of Computer Science
University of Manitoba
September 2021 to Present

Certifications:

National Lifeguard Pool, Held since June 2019
February 2026 to February 2028

Lifesaving Instructor, Held since August 2024
August 2024 to August 2026

Swim for Life Instructor, Held since August 2024
August 2024 to August 2026

Examiner - Bronze Level, Held since August 2024
August 2024 to August 2026

Intermediate First Aid, CPR-C & AED Certification, Held since March 2019
August 2026 to August 2028
